description_long: This is a mid-top casual shoe crafted primarily from brown leather, featuring a textured side panel and smooth toe cap. The shoe has a white rubber sole with a subtle tread, and the interior is lined with a red fabric, visible around the ankle collar. The lacing system uses standard criss-cross brown laces threaded through eyelets, and there is a small pull tab at the back for easy wearing. The heel and side panels are reinforced, suggesting durability for urban walking. The overall design is modern yet understated, suitable for everyday use in city environments. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A brown leather mid-top casual shoe with a white rubber sole, red interior lining, and standard criss-cross laces. The design is modern, durable, and suitable for urban wear.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the smooth toe cap, textured side panel, and red interior lining.
description_view_1: Rear angle highlighting the pull tab, reinforced heel, and the layered construction of the sole.
description_view_2: Side profile displaying the textured leather panel, red fabric accent, and the full length of the white sole.
description_view_3: Top-front view emphasizing the lacing system, toe cap, and the open collar with visible red lining.
